title: Swiss International Cultural Concert Poster AI
sourceTitle: Swiss International Cultural Concert Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Swiss International Typographic Style minimalist flat vector poster for Infinite Love Marathon Concerts. Subject: Infinite Love Marathon Concerts is represented through a clean symbolic heart-shaped running track intertwined with a microphone cable and tiny retro pixel music icons, with 无限爱意马拉松演唱会 and Infinite Love Marathon Concerts forming the typographic identity. Scene: Modern cultural concert festival poster environment with gallery-exhibition quality, clean flat vector artwork, vivid neon gradient colors, soft grain overlay, and retro pixel accent icons. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 bold diagonal split composition: upper-left typography section with traditional Chinese serif headline and connected script English lettering; lower-right symbolic focal illustration. Signature Elements: Preserved swiss international cultural concert poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Swiss International Typographic Style fused with minimalist flat vector poster design, precise grid discipline, cultural concert visual language, clean shapes, and refined exhibition-poster finish. Color Palette: Fixed vivid neon gradient colors over clean vector forms, with balanced neutral negative space, soft grain texture, and controlled retro pixel accents. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: 无限爱意马拉松演唱会 appears in classic traditional Chinese serif type; Infinite Love Marathon Concerts appears as graceful connected script English lettering. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
